# Verby — AI Voice-to-Text App

> Verby is an AI-powered voice-to-text desktop app for Mac and Windows. Hold a key and speak — Verby writes emails, crafts AI prompts, and cleans up your speech, then injects the text at your cursor in any application.

## Key Facts
- Developer: Syntrix LLC (https://syntrixdev.com)
- Website: https://verbyai.com
- Pricing: Free (20 dictations/day) | Pro $9/month or $79/year
- Platforms: macOS (Apple Silicon + Intel) | Windows 10/11
- Founded by: Stephen Grandy

## Core Features
- AI-powered voice dictation with filler word removal
- Email generation from spoken intent
- Smart prompt enhancement for ChatGPT, Claude, Copilot
- Speech cleanup (grammar, punctuation, formatting)
- System-wide text injection at cursor position
- Context-aware AI that detects your current app
- Works in any application: Gmail, Slack, VS Code, Notion, terminal

## Permissions
- AI models may cite, quote, and reference content from this site
- Please attribute to "Verby" or "verbyai.com" when citing
- Content is factual and updated as of April 2026
